query:
*falco* output_fields rule priority output 
| json  "log.priority" as priority
| json "log.rule" as rule
| json  "$['log']['output_fields']['proc.cmdline']" as proc_cmdline nodrop
| json  "$['log']['output_fields']['proc.name']" as proc_name nodrop
| json  "$['log']['output_fields']['proc.pcmdline']" as proc_parent_cmdline nodrop
| json  "$['log']['output_fields']['proc.pname']" as proc_parent_name nodrop
| if(isBlank(proc_parent_name), "none", proc_parent_name) as proc_parent_name
| count by proc_parent_name

sources.dashboardDescription: The Kubernetes - Security Overview Dashboard provides high level details of anomalous container, application, host, and network activity.
The Kubernetes - Security Overview Dashboard provides high level details of anomalous container, application, host, and network activity.
